title: KV
excerpt: description: Use the Workers KV binding API to read, write, delete, and list key-value pairs from your Worker code. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. * [ Read key-value pairs ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/api/read-key-value-pairs/) * [ Write key-value pairs ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/api/write-key-value-pairs/)
